column3: Clark County Sheriff (online sales) + Common Pleas / Prosecutor
column4: Common Pleas 101 N Limestone St, Springfield, OH 45502
column9: Sheriff sales online Fri 10am. Tax sale list published 3 weeks in News-Sun + courthouse lobby. PDF form - parse effort.
Online Delinquency Report: parcel, address, name, amount, cert year - searchable. Easiest high-value pull.

column3: City of Springfield - Code Compliance Division
column4: 76 E High St, 2nd Fl, Springfield, OH 45502
column9: No bulk-download portal. City uses Cityworks backend; ask about case export. Records request needed.

column3: City of Springfield - Code Compliance + Building Regulations
column4: 76 E High St, 2nd Fl, Springfield, OH 45502
column9: No standing online register. City periodically publishes demolition bid lists. Request condemned/demo list directly.
Searchable online (Kofile/CountyFusion). Free search; copies have fees. Query by doc type; no CSV export.

column4: Recorder 31 N Limestone; Clerk 101 N Limestone, Springfield
column9: Tax liens at Recorder. Judgment liens (incl. state income tax) at Clerk Civil via eServices (nightly). Query by party type.

column3: City of Springfield - Utility Billing Division
column4: 76 E High St, 1st Fl, Springfield, OH 45502
column9: No public disconnection list. Often denied/redacted as exempt customer data. Hard to obtain.

column3: City of Springfield - Building Regulations (Community Dev.)
column4: 76 E High St, 2nd Fl, Springfield, OH 45502
column9: Online via BS&A + Cityworks. Individual status searchable; full open/expired list needs request/BS&A query.

column3: Clark County Municipal Court - Clerk of Courts
column9: FED cases here. Online search single-case (Lotus Notes). Scrape FED by plaintiff or request eviction case-list report.

column3: Ohio AG Collections (Estate Recovery); liens at Clark Recorder
column4: Recorder 31 N Limestone, Springfield; AGO Columbus
column9: No statewide downloadable list. Recorded liens at county Recorder index. State recovery via AGO, not a lead list.
